title: Blockify [Mod Only]
description: Horror hit game "Pacify" adaption into a custom mod.
body:
# Blockify [Minecraft Edition] - Mod Only, does not work alone!

> **This mod is a recreation of the survival horror game Pacify, fully adapted for Minecraft Fabric 1.20.1.**

# ⚠ Does not work alone, modpack & map needed. Link to the modpack : [Blockify - Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/blockify-horror)

Experience the terror of the original Pacify game, fully recreated in Minecraft.

This project is a complete conversion that turns Minecraft into a survival horror experience. You are a paranormal investigator hired to check on an old funeral home. But there is a rumor... a girl named **Emilia** is haunting the place, and she is not alone.

---

### 👻 What does this project add?
Unlike simple horror maps, this modpack features custom coded mechanics and unique 3D models to replicate the exact gameplay of Pacify:

* **Custom Entity AI:** Face off against Emilia, who switches between a calm wandering state and a terrifying flying monster.
* **3D Animated Models:** Fully animated custom assets using GeckoLib (The Girl, Marked Dolls, Boiler, Matchbox, etc.).
* **Gameplay Mechanics:**
    * **Boiler System:** Gather wood and matches to keep the fire going.
    * **Doll Hunting:** Find the marked dolls and burn them to win.
    * **Pacify Mechanic:** Hold a normal doll to calm Emilia down if she charges at you.
    * **Revive System:** Use the boiler to bring fallen teammates back to life.

---

### 🕯️ How to Play - [ONLY WORK ON THE [MODPACK](https://modrinth.com/modpack/blockify-horror)]
Your goal is simple: **Burn 9 Marked Dolls.**

1.  **Explore** the house and find Keys to unlock bedrooms, the attic, and the basement.
2.  **Loot** Wood and Matches to activate the Boiler in the basement.
3.  **Catch** the Marked Dolls running around the house.
4.  **Burn** them in the boiler.
5.  **Survive.** If Emilia transforms, run, hide, or give her a normal doll.

---

### ⚠️ Critical Information & Settings - [ONLY WORK ON THE [MODPACK](https://modrinth.com/modpack/blockify-horror)]
To experience the game as intended, please follow these settings:

* **Minecraft Version:** Fabric 1.20.1
* **FOV:** Set to **65** (Crucial for the horror perspective).
* **Shaders:** You **MUST** enable the included "Insanity" shader.
* **Brightness:** Set to Moody.
* **Audio:** Music: OFF / Sound Effects: ON.

---

### 🏆 Credits
This project is a fan-made tribute created with ♡

* **Minecraft Adaptation (Code, Map, Models):** Created by Tygation & arknx.
* **Original Game:** Based on Pacify by Shawn Hitchcock (SKH Apps). *Please support the original game on Steam!*
* **Textures:** Original assets by RedXuchilbara, updated by Usaki.
* **Voices:** kitsunenocturne (Discord)
